lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major systems are fully functional, though some components show light usage.

Looking for a rewarding project? This car is ready for someone with a vision! It is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work, making it the perfect choice for a mechanic or a DIY enthusiast looking for a budget-friendly fixer-upper. It's a great opportunity to bring a vehicle back to life at a fantastic price!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear evidence of its age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a few small dings on the side panels, and some minor paint oxidation on the roof. Inside, the cabin shows wear, including some staining on the carpets and a worn driver's seat bolster. While the car is currently operational and drives fine, a potential buyer should expect to address some upcoming maintenance items and minor cosmetic imperfections to bring it back to its best state.

This vehicle is in good overall condition, reflecting a history of consistent maintenance. The exterior paint still holds a great shine, although there are typical minor cosmetic imperfections like small stone chips on the front bumper and a few light scratches from regular use. Inside, the cabin is well-preserved with minor wear on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts as it should. It is a dependable vehicle that has been well-looked after by its previous owner.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and have been maintained to original factory standards.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing mechanical integrity with sophisticated aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent care, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. We invite you to experience the reliability and performance of a machine that remains in commendable condition, presented at a price point that reflects its significant remaining service life and overall excellence.

Hey there! Thanks so much for checking out my car! I’ve absolutely loved driving this beauty, and it’s still in really wonderful shape. It runs smoothly, looks great on the road, and has been super dependable for all my trips. It’s been well-cared for and is just waiting for a new home where it can get back out on the open road. I’m looking for a quick, friendly sale, so feel free to message me—I'd love to see this go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have!

This BMW E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-strung S54 inline-six engine, equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis has been enhanced with essential subframe reinforcement plates to maintain structural integrity under high lateral loads. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory M-Variable differential lock. Recent service includes a valve clearance adjustment and cooling system overhaul. While the aesthetic reflects its 'good' condition status with minor road wear, the mechanical vitals are superb, offering the precise turn-in and communicative steering rack synonymous with the chassis's 50/50 weight distribution.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Minor exterior scratches. Clean title.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a prime example of a well-cared-for daily driver. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor signs of road use consistent with its age, such as small stone chips on the front fascia and a few light surface scratches. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains soft and supportive, with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster and no tears or stains. All technological features, including the high-fidelity sound system and dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced at regular intervals; the tires have significant tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm and responsive. This car offers a balanced blend of luxury and reliability, making it an excellent choice for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road today.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of distinguished pedigree, maintained to rigorous standards to ensure peak operational efficiency. This motorcar exhibits a commendable balance of aesthetic integrity and mechanical prowess. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point evaluation, it stands as a testament to enduring quality and sophisticated engineering. We invite you to acquire a machine that promises both prestige and dependable performance.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a thorough inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards meet our rigorous criteria. With a focus on reliability and sophisticated engineering, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning buyer. This is a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me! Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car is ready for its next adventure. It's been well-loved and still looks great inside and out. Come take it for a spin—I think you're really going to love how it drives!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Minimal wear.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between premium comfort and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor road chips and light surface wear consistent with a well-maintained daily driver. Inside, the cabin remains a serene environment; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, while all electronic features—including the responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control—function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in robust health. It has been serviced at regular intervals, recently receiving a comprehensive fluid flush and a fresh set of high-quality tires. It starts effortlessly, idles smoothly, and provides a confident, stable ride on both city streets and highways. This is a dependable, honest example that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

Secure this exceptional value and elevate your daily commute with a vehicle that balances sophistication and practicality.

Hey there! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really wonderful shape, super reliable, and has been kept very clean. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready to go and feels great on the road. I’ve taken really good care of it, and I just know you’re going to love it as much as I have!

It runs like a dream and is super comfortable for both daily commutes and fun weekend trips. I’ve taken wonderful care of it, and it’s totally ready for its next adventure with you. This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing for surgical throttle response. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive valve adjustment to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. The chassis retains its factory-spec handling characteristics with a well-sorted multi-link rear suspension and communicative rack-and-pinion steering. Reliable daily driver. Strong engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall condition, offering a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor road nicks and light surface marks consistent with careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and all electronic features—including the navigation system, dual-zone climate control, and heated seats—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound and turn-key ready, having undergone consistent oil changes and all manufacturer-recommended interval services. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and firm braking. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the engine bay is clean and free of leaks. This is a well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle exemplifies a standard of maintenance that ensures both reliability and sustained performance. Featuring a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to confirm its mechanical integrity and road-readiness, representing a superior value proposition in its class.
